description_long: This object is a shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, matte black barrel that widens into a flared muzzle. The barrel is segmented by two greenish metallic bands, adding a touch of detail to its otherwise utilitarian appearance. The stock is made of dark brown wood, shaped ergonomically for shoulder support, and transitions smoothly into the receiver. A simple, curved trigger and a rounded trigger guard are visible beneath the receiver, with no visible pump or lever mechanisms. The overall construction suggests a robust and functional firearm, suitable for use in urban or rural environments. The finish is mostly matte, with subtle highlights on the metal and wood surfaces.
description: A matte black, single-barrel shotgun with a flared muzzle, green metallic bands, and a dark wooden stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the flared muzzle, green bands, and wooden stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flared muzzle and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, flared muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
